title: Miso-Marinated Venezuelan Bresaola Tacos
description: Tender and smoky Venezuelan bresaola tacos with a rich miso-marinate, served with a side of tangy slaw for a romantic dinner.

ingredients.name: Bresaola (air-dried beef)
ingredients.notes: Look for tamasic-free, grass-fed, and organic options.

ingredients.name: Slaw (mix of shredded cabbage, carrots, red onion, cilantro)

instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine miso paste, apple cider vinegar, maple syrup, garam masala, smoked paprika, garlic powder, and black pepper to make the miso-marinate.
Transfer the miso-marinate to a shallow dish and add the bresaola slices, making sure they're coated evenly.
Cover the dish with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Remove the bresaola from the miso-marinate, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Grill the bresaola slices for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they're nicely charred.
Warm the corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a few slices of the grilled bresaola onto a warmed tortilla, followed by a spoonful of the slaw and a squeeze of lime juice.
Drizzle the avocado oil over the tacos and serve immediately.
